legal-notice-v1.name: Legal Notice (Debt Claim)
legal-notice-v1.content:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Subject: Formal Legal Notice for Debt Claim: {{amount}} {{currency}}

On behalf of our client {{partyB.name}}, we hereby formally notify you to settle the outstanding amount of {{amount}} {{currency}} no later than {{dueDate}}.

Failure to comply with this notice within the specified period will leave our client with no choice but to initiate legal proceedings to protect their interests, including filing a lawsuit with the competent courts.

Sincerely,

resolution-v1.name: Board Resolution
resolution-v1.content:
Board Resolution No. ({{resolutionNumber}})

The Board of Directors of {{companyName}} met on {{meetingDate}}, and has unanimously decided the following:

{{resolutionDetails}}

The Board has authorized Mr./Ms. {{authorizedPerson}} to take all necessary measures to implement this resolution.

Signatures of Board Members:

poa-v1.name: Special Power of Attorney
poa-v1.content:
I, the undersigned, {{principalName}}, holding Civil ID No. {{principalId}}, in my capacity as ({{principalRole}}), hereby appoint Mr./Ms. {{agentName}}, holding Civil ID No. {{agentId}}, as my attorney-in-fact to represent me in:

{{poaScope}}

This Power of Attorney is valid for {{validityPeriod}} from the date of issuance. The attorney-in-fact is not authorized to delegate this power to others without prior written consent.

Principal Signature:

delegation-v1.name: Delegation of Authority
delegation-v1.content:
In my capacity as ({{principalRole}}), I hereby delegate authority to Mr./Ms. {{delegateName}} to perform {{authorityScope}} and represent the company before official entities between {{startDate}} and {{endDate}}.

Principal:
Signature:

resignation-v1.name: Resignation Receipt
resignation-v1.content:
{{companyName}} hereby acknowledges receipt of the resignation submitted by Mr./Ms. {{employeeName}} on {{resignationDate}}. The last working day will be {{lastWorkingDay}}.

The company wishes him/her success in future endeavors.

Manager Signature:
